summary: Analyzed test coverage for 3 V3 core engines: brain_pipeline.py (94.54% - excellent), autofix_engine.py (55.80% - needs work), fail_engine.py (99.75% - outstanding). Ran 1,142 tests across 7 test files, all passing. Identified 44-line gap in autofix_engine patch generation logic that requires 10-15 new tests.

brain_pipeline.py.assessment: Production-grade. Missing lines are error handlers.

autofix_engine.py.assessment: Significant gap. Tests are enum/dataclass validation only. Missing: patch generation (307-434), fix application (558-669), LLM integration (1183-1351).

fail_engine.py.assessment: Outstanding. Only 1 unreachable/rare edge case line uncovered.

immediate: autofix_engine.py: Write 10-15 new tests targeting patch generation (lines 307-434), fix application (558-669), and LLM integration (1183-1351). Expected gain: 30-35pp to reach 85%+.
no_action: brain_pipeline.py: 94.54% is production-grade. Missing lines are error handlers.
fail_engine.py: 99.75% is outstanding. The 1 missing line is not actionable.
future: Refactor autofix_engine to separate patch generation, fix application, and LLM integration into smaller modules for easier testing.
